testcase.name: test_listing_create_individual_variant_a_payload
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_129_runtime_enhancements.py:483: in test_listing_create_individual_variant_a_payload assert draft_response.status_code == 200, f"Individual A payload failed: {draft_response.json()}" E AssertionError: Individual A payload failed: {'detail': 'Database connection error', 'error_code': 'DB_ERROR'} E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_listing_create_corporate_variant_b_payload
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_129_runtime_enhancements.py:535: in test_listing_create_corporate_variant_b_payload assert draft_response.status_code == 200, f"Corporate B payload failed: {draft_response.json()}" E AssertionError: Corporate B payload failed: {'detail': 'Database connection error', 'error_code': 'DB_ERROR'} E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code
